title: The Silence After Goodbye
theme: The silence becomes its own chapter.
sceneDescription: Chapter 33 is presented as a privacy-safe stylized memoir scene using rain-softened window light, empty road, fading leaves. The Living Scene Layer supports the memory without changing the manuscript text or recreating real people photorealistically.
privacyNotes: Use privacy-safe, stylized, non-photorealistic character presence. Do not create final faces unless explicitly approved.
